stories.title: SCOTUS upholds bans on transgender athletes
stories.summary: The Supreme Court on Tuesday issued a decision to uphold state laws barring transgender girls and women from playing on school athletic teams.

stories.title: Morocco win shootout to send Netherlands home
stories.summary: Morocco beat the Netherlands in a penalty shootout after the match finished 1-1 Monday night to advance to the round of 16.

stories.title: Sources: RFA Duren to meet with Lakers, Kings
stories.summary: Pistons restricted free agent Jalen Duren has meetings set up with the Lakers and Kings when free agency begins Tuesday.
